Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Robyn Andrews To Perpetuate Testimony Of William Andrews By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Dec-16-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES via CourtCall:
Kimberly J. Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for petitioner and moving party Robyn Andrews.
James N. Sinunu of SINUNU BRUNI, LLP (415-362-9700), specially appearing for defendants and opposing party Fischbach & Moore and Rosendin Electric.

Mirna J. Scheffy of HAWKINS PARNELL & YOUNG (415-766-3225) specially appearing for defendants Albay Construction and Triple A Machine Shop Inc.

Jon C. James of HUGO & PARKER (415-808-0300), specially appearing for defendant Guittard Chocolate Holding Co.
Suzanne E. Rischman of SELMAN BREITMAN LLP (415-979-0400), specially appearing for defendant O.C. MacDonald.
Nicole B. Yuen of FOLEY & MANSFIELD (510-590-9500), specially appearing for defendant Cupertino Electric, Inc.
Michael J. Boland of IMAI, TADLOCK, KEENEY & CORDERY, LLP (415-675-7000x3010), specially appearing for defendant Graham Electrical Contractors, Inc.

RULING:
Hearing held, argued and tentative ruling amended as follows: The Petition of Robyn Andrews to Perpetuate Testimony of William Andrews by Videotaped deposition is GRANTED under Code of Civil Procedure section 2035.010. Petitioner filed proofs of service as to all prospective defendants named in the petition. All parties must file a Notice of Special Appearance within two court days upon receipt of this order. Deposition will occur within 45 days of this order via Zoom/remote technology. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
